allow: PowerShell($loc = Get-Location; Write-Output "CWD: $loc"; python --version 2>&1; Get-Item index.html, style.css, script.js | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Big\\+Shoulders'\) { Write-Output "FONT_OK" } else { Write-Output "FONT_MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match 'hero-title-italic'\) { Write-Output "HERO_OK" } else { Write-Output "HERO_MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match 'IČO: 09270884'\) { Write-Output "ICO_PRESERVED" } else { Write-Output "ICO_MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match '720 773 117'\) { Write-Output "PHONE_PRESERVED" } } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/style.css" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "CSS Status: $\($css.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "CSS Length: $\($css.Content.Length\)"; $js = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/script.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "JS Status: $\($js.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "JS Length: $\($js.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($css = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/style.css?v=7" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content; $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content; $js = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/script.js?v=7" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content; if \($css -match 'hero-schematic'\) { Write-Output "SCHEMATIC_CSS_OK" }; if \($html -match 'hero-schematic'\) { Write-Output "SCHEMATIC_HTML_OK" }; if \($css -match '\\.rail\\s'\) { Write-Output "RAIL_CSS_OK" }; if \($html -match 'class="rail"'\) { Write-Output "RAIL_HTML_OK" }; if \($js -match 'rail-link'\) { Write-Output "RAIL_JS_OK" }; if \($css -match 'cursor: url'\) { Write-Output "CURSOR_OK" }; if \($css -match ':focus-visible'\) { Write-Output "FOCUS_OK" }; Write-Output "CSS:$\($css.Length\) HTML:$\($html.Length\) JS:$\($js.Length\)")
